title: Tripadvisor Reviews Scraper Input
description: 📌 Input schema for the Tripadvisor Reviews Scraper actor.

query.title: 🔗 Twitter URLs or handle
query.description: Twitter URLs or handles to scrape. Accepts both full URLs and usernames.

maxResults.title: Maximum Number of Results
maxResults.description: The maximum number of results to scrape. Ignored when Parse All Available Results is enabled.

parseAllResults.title: Parse All Available Results
parseAllResults.description: If checked, the scraper will keep paginating until no more results are available.

ratingIs.title: ⭐ Include Ratings
ratingIs.description: Restrict results to reviews with specific star ratings.

engagementMin Likes.title: ❤️ Minimum Likes
engagementMin Likes.description: Minimum number of likes (hearts). Leave empty for no minimum.

searchResultsDatasetId.title: 🗂 Use Results Datasets
searchResultsDatasetId.description: Select datasets from another Actor. Each dataset item should contain a `url` field that will be enqueued together with any Start URLs.

lang.title: 🗣️ Language (regex)
lang.description: Language to filter reviews by (e.g., 'es,fr'). When using this, only query and locale can be specified.

errorMessage.pattern: Language must be a two-letter language code (e.g., 'es' or 'fr')

langselect.title: 🗣️ Language (select)
langselect.description: Language–country code for localization. Matches the country selector in the TripAdvisor website footer.
